summary: G1 works layer: sources/works.toml (9 grouped works) + scripts/works.py loader with invariant tests
description: works.toml: [[work]] id/label/tradition/members (reading order) for the 9 grouped works in work-grouping.md; singletons implicit. works.py load_works() materializes all 52; validates member texts exist, each text in exactly one work, single-tradition per work.
